metadata.author: Joshua
metadata.subject: Israel's Occupying and Possessing the Good Land of Canaan for the Carrying Out of God's Economy.

1: Now after the death of Moses the servant of Jehovah, Jehovah spoke to Joshua the son of Nun, Moses' attendant, saying,
Moses My servant is dead; now then arise, cross over this Jordan, you and all this people, into the land which I am giving to them, to the children of Israel.
Every place on which the sole of your foot treads I have given to you, as I promised Moses.
2: Then Joshua the son of Nun sent two men from Shittim secretly as spies, saying, Go, view the land, especially Jericho. And they went and came into the house of a harlot whose name was Rahab, and they stayed there.
And it was told the king of Jericho, saying, Men from the children of Israel have come here tonight to spy out the land.

1.text: The name Joshua means 'Jehovah the Savior' or 'Jehovah's Salvation.' This is the Hebrew equivalent of the Greek name Jesus.

3.text: This indicates that while God had already given the land, the children of Israel had to cooperate by walking on it to practically possess it.
